MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jan-17-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-21-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: La Von Granger. Steven C. Williams, Esq. appeared on behalf of Plaintiff, Anthony W. Belmonte and Defendant, LC McGehee appeared in pro per. The case settled by stipulation of parties not read into the record. Trial date is vacated.
